title: broccoli-uv-vis-nir-chemometrics: Reproducible MATLAB pipelines for UV-VIS-NIR spectroscopy in broccoli by-products
description: Reproducible MATLAB workflows for UV-VIS-NIR reflectance spectroscopy preprocessing, modelling, interpretability, and decision support in broccoli by-product datasets. The repository includes a curated input matrix and objective-specific scripts covering univariate factorial inference, spectral structure analysis, nested cross-validation partial least squares regression, VIP stability assessment, and within-domain prioritisation.
